name: Surgical Striker - S.P.E.C.T.R.A.
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>閃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ．Ｐ．Ｅ．Ｃ．Ｔ．Ｒ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スペクトラ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2+ monsters, including a Link Monster
(This card is always treated as a "Sky Striker Ace" card.)
Must first be Link Summoned. Loses 3000 ATK while you have no Spells in your GY. When your opponent activates a card or effect as Chain Link 2 or higher (Quick Effect): You can banish 2 Spells from your hand and/or GY; negate that effect, then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Surgical Striker - S.P.E.C.T.R.A." once per turn.

eff_types: Condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Quick, Condition
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Link Monsters as Link Materials
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
